summary: Tested Game Master Panel (GMP) and all requested features. All data-testid elements present and functional. One design bug: 'Made with Emergent' badge (z-index:9999) overlaps GMP toggle button (z-index:50), preventing normal user click. Panel works correctly when opened via JS. Score adjustment, turn control, restore tab, and QuestionPage timer controls all PASS.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge has z-index:9999, covers gmp-toggle-btn (z-index:50). Real users cannot click the ⚙ button. Fix: increase gmp-toggle-btn z-index to > 9999 (e.g., z-[10000])

issues: GMP panel is 360px wide and renders off the right edge at 1920px viewport initially (translateX 100%); opens correctly once toggle is clicked via JS

action_items: Fix gmp-toggle-btn z-index: change className from z-50 to z-[10000] or higher to appear above 'Made with Emergent' badge (z-index:9999)
critical_code_review_comments: GameBoardPage.jsx line 286: button has className including z-50 but 'Made with Emergent' badge has z-index:9999. Change to z-[10000] to fix overlay.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GMP features all PASS in DOM. GMP toggle button covered by 'Made with Emergent' badge. Fix z-index of gmp-toggle-btn. All other features: score +300/+600/+900/-300/-600/-900, team selection, custom input, score-edit buttons, turn tab (set-turn-1/2, next-turn), restore tab (shows 'لا توجد'), QuestionPage timer controls (pause-resume, reset, start) all PASS. Team1 score updated to 300 after +300 click confirmed.

test_results.gmp-toggle-btn_clickable_by_user: FAIL - covered by Made with Emergent badge (z-index:9999 > 50)
test_results.score_adjustment_functional: PASS - team1 score updated to 300 after +300 click
